---
title: "Simulation Results"
author: ""
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output: vthemes::vmodern
params:
  results_dir: 
    label: "Results directory"
    value: "results/test"
  vary_param_name:
    label: "Name of varying parameter"
    value: NULL
  seed:
    label: "Seed"
    value: 331
  keep_vars:
    label: "Max variables to keep in rejection probability plots"
    value: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(magrittr)
chunk_idx <- 1

# set parameters
results_dir <- params$results_dir
vary_param_name <- params$vary_param_name
seed <- params$seed
if (!is.null(params$keep_vars)) {
  keep_vars <- 0:params$keep_vars
} else {
  keep_vars <- params$keep_vars
}
```

```{r helper-functions, echo = FALSE}
# reformat results
reformat_results <- function(results) {
  if (!("support") %in% colnames(results)) {
    results <- results %>%
      dplyr::mutate(support = NA)
  }
  results_grouped <- results %>%
    dplyr::group_by(index) %>%
    tidyr::nest(fi_scores = var:(tidyselect::last_col())) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(-index)
  return(results_grouped)
}

# plot metrics (mean value across repetitions with error bars)
plot_metrics <- function(results, vary_param_name, show_errbars = TRUE) {
  plt_df <- results %>%
    tidyr::unite(col = "model", 
                 fi, model, #min_samples_leaf, 
                 na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(model = as.factor(model)) %>%
    dplyr::select(rep, model, 
                  tidyselect::all_of(c(paste0(vary_param_name, "_name"), 
                                       metrics))) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = tidyselect::all_of(metrics), 
                        names_to = "metric")  %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]],
                    model, metric) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(value), sd = sd(value), .groups = "keep")
  
  if (length(unique(plt_df[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]])) == 1) {
    plt <- ggplot2::ggplot(plt_df) +
      ggplot2::aes(x = model, y = mean) +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4, ncol = 3) +
      ggplot2::geom_point() +
      vthemes::theme_vmodern() +
      vthemes::scale_color_vmodern(discrete = TRUE) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = "Model")
    if (show_errbars) {
      plt <- plt + 
        ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
          mapping = ggplot2::aes(x = model, ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd)
        )
    }
  } else {
    plt <- ggplot2::ggplot(plt_df) +
      ggplot2::aes(x = .data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]], 
                   y = mean, color = model)  +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", 
                          nrow = ceiling(length(unique(plt_df$metric)) / 3),
                          ncol = 3) +
      ggplot2::geom_point() +
      ggplot2::geom_line() +
      vthemes::theme_vmodern() +
      vthemes::scale_color_vmodern(discrete = TRUE) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = vary_param_name)
    if (show_errbars) {
      plt <- plt + 
        ggplot2::geom_errorbar(
          mapping = ggplot2::aes(x = .data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]],
                                 ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd)
        )
    }
  }
  return(plt)
}

# plot rejection probability curves
plot_reject_prob <- function(results, vary_param_name, keep_vars = NULL) {
  plt_df <- results %>%
    tidyr::unite(col = "model", 
                 fi, model, #min_samples_leaf, 
                 na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(model = as.factor(model)) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(fi_scores) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(support),
                  !(stringr::str_detect(as.character(model), "Knockoff"))) 
  if (nrow(plt_df) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  plt_df <- plt_df %>%
    dplyr::select(tidyselect::all_of(paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")), 
                  rep, model, var, importance) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]], model, var)  %>%
    dplyr::summarise(.alpha = sort(unique(c(0, importance, 1))),
                     reject_prob = (stats::ecdf(importance))(.alpha),
                     .groups = "keep")
  if (!is.null(keep_vars)) {
    plt_df <- plt_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(var %in% keep_vars)
  }
  
  plt_ls <- list()
  for (val in unique(plt_df[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]])) {
    plt_ls[[as.character(val)]] <- plt_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]] == !!val) %>%
      ggplot2::ggplot() +
      ggplot2::aes(x = .alpha, y = reject_prob, color = model) +
      ggplot2::geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "grey") +
      ggplot2::geom_line() +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ var) +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
      ggplot2::labs(title = sprintf("%s = %s", vary_param_name, val),
                    x = "alpha", y = "rejection probability") +
      vthemes::theme_vmodern() +
      vthemes::scale_color_vmodern(discrete = TRUE)
  }
  return(plt_ls)
}

# plot feature importances
plot_feature_importance <- function(results, vary_param_name, keep_vars = NULL, 
                                    plot_type = c("boxplot", "bar")) {
  plot_type <- match.arg(plot_type)
  plt_df <- results %>%
    tidyr::unite(col = "model", 
                 fi, model, #min_samples_leaf, 
                 na.rm = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(model = as.factor(model)) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(fi_scores) 
  if (plot_type == "bar") {
    plt_df <- plt_df %>%
      dplyr::select(tidyselect::all_of(paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")),
                    rep, model, var, importance) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]], model, var)  %>%
      dplyr::summarise(mean_fi = mean(importance), #sd_fi = sd(importance),
                       .groups = "keep")
  }
  if (!is.null(keep_vars)) {
    plt_df <- plt_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(var %in% keep_vars)
  }
  plt_ls <- list()
  for (val in unique(plt_df[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]])) {
    if (plot_type == "bar") {
      plt <- plt_df %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]] == !!val) %>%
        ggplot2::ggplot() +
        ggplot2::aes(x = var, y = mean_fi) +
        ggplot2::geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "grey98", fill = "#00C5FF") +
        ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free") +
        ggplot2::labs(title = sprintf("%s = %s", vary_param_name, val),
                      x = "Feature", y = "Mean Importance / Significance") +
        vthemes::theme_vmodern()
    } else if (plot_type == "boxplot") {
      plt <- plt_df %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data[[paste0(vary_param_name, "_name")]] == !!val) %>%
        ggplot2::ggplot() +
        ggplot2::aes(x = var, y = importance, group = var) +
        ggplot2::geom_boxplot() +
        ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free") +
        ggplot2::labs(title = sprintf("%s = %s", vary_param_name, val),
                      x = "Feature", y = "Importance / Significance") +
        vthemes::theme_vmodern()
    }
    plt_ls[[as.character(val)]] <- plt
  }
  return(plt_ls)
}

# view results in Rmarkdown
# notes: need to set 'results = "asis"' in the code chunk header
view_results <- function(results_ls, metrics_plt_ls, metrics_errbar_plt_ls,
                         power_plt_ls, fi_bar_plt_ls, fi_box_plt_ls, 
                         interactive = TRUE) {
  cat(sprintf("\n\n# %s {.tabset .tabset-vmodern}\n\n", 
              basename(results_dir)))
  
  for (sim_name in names(results_ls)) {
    vary_param_name <- stringr::str_remove(sim_name, "^varying\\_")
    cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {.tabset .tabset-pills}\n\n", sim_name))
    
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### Tables\n\n"))
    vthemes::subchunkify(vthemes::pretty_DT(results_ls[[sim_name]]), 
                         i = chunk_idx)
    chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
    
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### Plots {.tabset .tabset-pills .tabset-square}\n\n"))
    if (interactive) {
      vthemes::subchunkify(plotly::ggplotly(metrics_plt_ls[[sim_name]]), 
                           i = chunk_idx, other_args = "out.width = '100%'",
                           add_class = "panel panel-default padded-panel")
      chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
      vthemes::subchunkify(plotly::ggplotly(metrics_errbar_plt_ls[[sim_name]]), 
                           i = chunk_idx, other_args = "out.width = '100%'",
                           add_class = "panel panel-default padded-panel")
    } else {
      vthemes::subchunkify(metrics_plt_ls[[sim_name]], i = chunk_idx)
      chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
      vthemes::subchunkify(metrics_errbar_plt_ls[[sim_name]], i = chunk_idx)
    }
    chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
    
    for (param_val in names(power_plt_ls[[sim_name]])) {
      cat(sprintf("\n\n#### %s = %s\n\n\n", vary_param_name, param_val))
      if (interactive) {
        vthemes::subchunkify(plotly::ggplotly(power_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]]), 
                             i = chunk_idx, other_args = "out.width = '100%'",
                             add_class = "panel panel-default padded-panel")
        chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
        vthemes::subchunkify(plotly::ggplotly(fi_box_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]]), 
                             i = chunk_idx, other_args = "out.width = '100%'",
                             add_class = "panel panel-default padded-panel")
        chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
        vthemes::subchunkify(plotly::ggplotly(fi_bar_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]]), 
                             i = chunk_idx, other_args = "out.width = '100%'",
                             add_class = "panel panel-default padded-panel")
      } else {
        vthemes::subchunkify(power_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]], i = chunk_idx)
        chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
        vthemes::subchunkify(fi_box_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]], i = chunk_idx)
        chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
        vthemes::subchunkify(fi_bar_plt_ls[[sim_name]][[param_val]], i = chunk_idx)
      }
      chunk_idx <<- chunk_idx + 1
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# read in results
results_ls <- list()
for (results_subdir in list.dirs(results_dir, full.names = T, recursive = F)) {
  if (!is.null(vary_param_name)) {
    if (!(results_subdir %in% file.path(results_dir, 
                                        paste0("varying_", vary_param_name)))) {
      next
    }
  }
  fname <- file.path(results_subdir, paste0("seed", seed), "results.csv")
  if (file.exists(fname)) {
    results_ls[[basename(results_subdir)]] <- data.table::fread(fname) %>%
      reformat_results()
  }
}

# plot evaluation metrics
metrics_plt_ls <- list()
metrics_errbar_plt_ls <- list()
for (sim_name in names(results_ls)) {
  metrics <- c("rocauc", "prauc", "f1", "precision", "recall", "specificity", 
               "fp", "tp", "neg", "pos", 
               "r2_rocauc", "r2_prauc", "r2_pval_cor") %>%
    intersect(colnames(results_ls[[sim_name]]))
  if (length(metrics) > 0) {
    vary_param_name <- stringr::str_remove(sim_name, "^varying\\_")
    metrics_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- plot_metrics(
      results_ls[[sim_name]], vary_param_name, show_errbars = FALSE
    )
    metrics_errbar_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- plot_metrics(
      results_ls[[sim_name]], vary_param_name
    )
  } else {
    metrics_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- NULL
    metrics_errbar_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- NULL
  }
}

# plot rejection probability curves
power_plt_ls <- list()
for (sim_name in names(results_ls)) {
  vary_param_name <- stringr::str_remove(sim_name, "^varying\\_")
  power_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- plot_reject_prob(
    results_ls[[sim_name]], vary_param_name, keep_vars
  )
}

# plot feature importances
fi_box_plt_ls <- list()
fi_bar_plt_ls <- list()
for (sim_name in names(results_ls)) {
  vary_param_name <- stringr::str_remove(sim_name, "^varying\\_")
  fi_box_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- plot_feature_importance(
    results_ls[[sim_name]], vary_param_name, keep_vars, plot_type = "boxplot"
  )
  fi_bar_plt_ls[[sim_name]] <- plot_feature_importance(
    results_ls[[sim_name]], vary_param_name, keep_vars, plot_type = "bar"
  )
}
```

```{r results = "asis"}
# display plots nicely in knitted html document
view_results(results_ls, metrics_plt_ls, metrics_errbar_plt_ls, power_plt_ls,
             fi_bar_plt_ls, fi_box_plt_ls)
```
